name: Canna-Global Acquisition Corp Warrant
summary: Canna-Global Acquisition Corp Warrant is a warrant to purchase shares of Canna-Global Acquisition Corp, a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC). These warrants give the holder the right to purchase a share of the company's common stock at a specified price in the future. Warrants are often issued as part of a unit offering during the SPAC's IPO.
